blockPalette.name: hero
blockPalette.description: Full-width hero with background image, H1, optional subtext and CTA. Video variant for Vimeo backgrounds.

rows.description: H1 heading, paragraph text, optional CTA link (all in one cell)

variantNotes.hero (video): Use 'Hero (video)' block name. Row 1 = Vimeo URL instead of image. Used on some treatment pages for background video.

blockPalette.name: columns
blockPalette.description: Side-by-side content layout for benefits grid. Highlights variant adds brand color accents.

rows.description: Column 1: H3 + paragraph | Column 2: H3 + paragraph | Column 3: H3 + paragraph (up to 4 columns)

row1:
Een natuurlijke uitstraling

JUVÉDERM® wordt gemaakt op basis van hyaluronzuur.

Toonaangevend

Wereldwijd het meest toonaangevende merk in fillers.

Langdurige resultaten

Het resultaat blijft 9 tot 24 maanden zichtbaar.

Hoge patiënt tevredenheid

Ruim 91% was tevreden na de behandeling.

blockPalette.name: carousel
blockPalette.description: Rotating slide content. Product-cards variant for JUVÉDERM® product showcase on treatment pages.

rows.description: Column 1: product image | Column 2: H4 product name + paragraph description

row1:

row2:
JUVÉDERM® VOLIFT met lidocaïne

Voor het herstellen van volume in het middengedeelte van het gezicht.

blockPalette.description: Before/after image comparison slider with Dutch labels (Voor/Na). Multiple rows create carousel with navigation dots.

rows.description: Column 1: before image | Column 2: after image

blockPalette.name: fragment
blockPalette.description: Reusable content inclusion via .plain.html. Used to load shared fragments (treatment-tabs, clinic-finder CTA, pharma notice).

homepage.description: Main landing page with hero, benefits, treatment explorer, and clinic finder CTA

sequences.content: Background: key visual (Sofie image). H1: 'Jouw unieke schoonheid'. Subtext intro paragraph.
H2: 'Accentueer je mooiste gezichtskenmerken met JUVÉDERM®'. Large portrait image (Lily). Intro paragraph about JUVÉDERM® product range.
H1: 'Waarom JUVÉDERM®?'
4 columns: natural look (H3+p), leading brand (H3+p), lasting results (H3+p), patient satisfaction (H3+p)
Small-text footnotes for benefit claims (references 1-17). Superscript markers match headings above.
H2: 'Bekijk de mogelijkheden van JUVÉDERM®'
/fragments/treatment-tabs
/fragments/clinic-finder-cta
/fragments/pharma-notice

metadata.title: JUVÉDERM Nederlands
metadata.description: Juvéderm® facial fillers help to enhance, restore or hydrate your features. Embrace what makes you, you.

treatment-page.description: Treatment-specific page. 5 instances: lips, eye-area, enhance, restore, male. All follow same template.

sequences.content: Background: treatment-specific key visual. H1: treatment title (e.g., 'Aantrekkelijke lippen'). Note: some pages use hero (video) variant with Vimeo background.
H2: treatment subtitle (e.g., 'Vollere lippen dankzij JUVÉDERM®'). 1-2 paragraphs describing the treatment area.
3 columns: benefit 1 (H4+p), benefit 2 (H4+p), benefit 3 (H4+p). Treatment-specific benefits.
H2: 'JUVÉDERM® maakt het verschil'. H3: 'Versterk je gelaatstrekken met JUVÉDERM® fillers'.
5-6 product cards: VOLBELLA, VOLIFT, ULTRA 4, ULTRA 3, ULTRA 2, etc. Each with product image, H4 name, description.
1-3 before/after comparison pairs for this treatment area.
H5: 'Ontdek het antwoord op je vraag'
3-5 treatment-specific FAQ items (e.g., consultation expectations, side effects, how fillers work, timeline). Each row: question | answer content.
CTA link: 'Meer' → /nl/qa
H2: 'Jouw behandeling met JUVÉDERM®'
/fragments/treatment-tabs
/fragments/clinic-finder-cta
/fragments/pharma-notice
Treatment-specific footnotes/citations. These are unique per treatment page, NOT a fragment.

faq.description: FAQ page with topic navigation, multiple accordion sections, and anchor-linked headings.

sequences.content: Background: FAQ key visual. H1: 'Ontdek het antwoord op je vraag'.
Anchor links: Over Juvéderm® (#about-juvederm), Kosten (#duration), Langdurige resultaten (#results), Veiligheid (#side-effects), Zones van het gezicht (#facial-areas)
H2: 'Wat is JUVÉDERM®?'. Info cards (H4 headings: product range, lasting results, unique plan, high quality) with supporting paragraphs.
H3: 'Wat zijn fillers?' with answer paragraph. H3: 'Wat is hyaluronzuur?' with answer paragraph.
H3: 'Belangrijkste leerpunten' — summary bullets.
H2: 'Voorbereiding op jouw behandeling met JUVÉDERM®'. H3: 'Zijn er bijwerkingen van JUVÉDERM®?' with answer content.
H3: 'Belangrijkste leerpunten' — summary bullets.
H2: 'Wat kan ik verwachten tijdens mijn consult?'. H3: treatment process, H3: pain expectations with answer paragraphs.
H3: 'Belangrijkste leerpunten' — summary bullets.
H2: 'Hoeveel kost een JUVÉDERM® behandeling?'. H3: 'Hoelang blijven de resultaten zichtbaar?' with H4 subheading on 9-24 month results. H3: 'Zijn de resultaten blijvend?'
H3: 'Belangrijkste leerpunten' — summary bullets.
H2: 'Waar in mijn gezicht kunnen fillers van JUVÉDERM® worden gebruikt?'. H4 overview paragraph. Treatment area descriptions.
Footnotes/citations for FAQ content.

metadata.title: Veelgestelde vragen Juvederm | Juvéderm® Netherlands
metadata.description: JUVÉDERM® is a collection of injectable facial fillers...

clinic-finder.description: Full-page clinic finder with Google Maps integration and city quick-links. Also covers /nl/clinics and /nl/clinic (results views).

sequences.content: H1: 'Vind een kliniek bij jou in de buurt'
Full-page layout. Config: heading, search placeholder, API key, country=NL. Quick city links: Amsterdam, Rotterdam, Den Haag, Utrecht.
/fragments/pharma-notice

metadata.title: Vind een kliniek | Juvéderm® Netherlands
metadata.description: Find the right clinic for you

contact.description: Simple contact information page. Minimal blocks — mostly default content.

sequences.content: H2: 'NEEM CONTACT OP'. Company name, address (Wegalaan 9, 2132 JD Hoofddorp), phone (+31 (0) 88 322 2843), email (infonederland@abbvie.com). Side effect reporting information.
/fragments/pharma-notice
Allergan Aesthetics/AbbVie legal notices, model disclaimers, document reference (NL-JUV-230072).

legal.description: Long-form legal text pages. Covers /nl/disclaimer and /nl/algemene-voorwaarden-kliniekzoeker. No interactive blocks.

sequences.content: H2: page-specific title (e.g., 'Disclaimer'). Multiple paragraphs of legal text. All default content — no blocks needed.

https://www.juvederm.nl.note: Root URL redirects to /nl. Create as redirect in redirects.xlsx.

https://www.juvederm.nl/nl/clinics.note: Clinic results page. Same template as find-a-clinic with location query param.

https://www.juvederm.nl/nl/clinic.note: Single clinic detail page. May need separate clinic-detail archetype if content differs.

navigation.description: Global navigation loaded by header block

sections.name: brand-bar
sections.content: Logo image (JUVÉDERM® logo) linked to /nl. Nav brand bar.

sections.name: primary-nav
sections.content: Unordered list of treatment links: Lippen (/nl/treatment/lips), Ogen (/nl/treatment/eye-area), Accentueren (/nl/treatment/enhance), Herstel (/nl/treatment/restore), Man (/nl/treatment/male)

sections.name: faq-dropdown
sections.content: Dropdown menu label: 'FAQ'. Submenu links: Over Juvéderm® (/nl/qa#about-juvederm), Kosten (/nl/qa#duration), Langdurige resultaten (/nl/qa#results), Veiligheid (/nl/qa#side-effects), Zones van het gezicht (/nl/qa#facial-areas)

footer.description: Global footer built from pseudo-footer content that lives in each page body (accordion + navigation-list). The AEM <footer> element is empty.

sections.name: footer-nav
sections.content: Accordion block with 2 groups: 'Behandeling' (treatment links: Lippen, Ogen, Accentueren, Herstel, Man) and 'FAQ' (anchor links to FAQ sections: Over Juvéderm®, Kosten, Langdurige resultaten, Veiligheid, Zones van het gezicht)

sections.name: legal-bar
sections.content: Default content: Allergan Aesthetics logo linked to allerganaesthetics.nl. Links: Neem contact op (/nl/contact-us), Privacy beleid (https://www.abbvie.nl/privacy.html)

sections.name: social-copyright
sections.content: Social links: Instagram (instagram.com/juvederm.nl), Facebook (facebook.com/juvederm.nl). Copyright: 'Materialen geleverd door Allergan Aesthetics, een bedrijf van AbbVie...'

footer.migrationNote: AEM footer element is empty. Footer content is actually rendered inside the page body as an accordion and navigation-list components. Extract this content and author it as the /footer document in EDS.

inventory.name: treatment-tabs
inventory.description: Female/Male treatment area explorer. Tabs block with VROUWELIJK/MANNELIJK labels. Each tab panel contains treatment area cards (image + heading + text + link). Content is identical across all pages.

defaultContent: H2 section heading: 'Jouw behandeling met JUVÉDERM®'

inventory.name: clinic-finder-cta
inventory.description: Compact clinic finder widget as page CTA. Includes heading and clinic-finder (compact) block.

defaultContent: H2: 'Vind een kliniek bij jou in de buurt'

inventory.name: pharma-notice
inventory.description: Required pharmaceutical disclaimer. Warning icon + text. Identical on all pages. Section style: pharma-notice.

defaultContent: Disclaimer text: 'Kijk uit. Jezelf mooier maken kan lelijk uitpakken. Een geslaagde ingreep begint bij een goede arts.'

componentToBlockMapping.notes: Teaser component with background image becomes hero block. Content cell: H1 + text + optional CTA.
Multiple title+text pairs in a grid container become columns block. Section style 'highlight' for branded background.
Card components inside carousel become carousel block rows. Each slide: image | H4 + text.
Custom block. Each slider pair becomes one row: before-image | after-image.
Tab labels map to column 1, tab content to column 2. One row per tab.
Accordion items: label as column 1, body as column 2. One row per item.
Configuration block. Key-value rows for heading, placeholder, API key, country.
Footer navigation-list groups become accordion block inside /footer document.
FAQ topic navigation becomes topic-menu custom block with anchor link list.
Vimeo URLs in hero context use hero (video) variant. Standalone Vimeo URLs auto-block as embed.
CSS-only. Apply section style 'scroll-reveal'. Implement via IntersectionObserver in scripts.js.
Modals (OneTrust cookie, privacy) are handled outside EDS content layer. OneTrust loaded via delayed.js.
Auto-loaded from /nav document. No block table needed in page content.
AEM containers map to EDS sections via --- separator. Style metadata applied as section metadata.

contentTransformations.description: Superscript reference markers (e.g., ®, †, ‡, 1-28) appear inline in headings and paragraphs. Preserve as <sup> elements in authored content. Example: 'Langdurige resultaten*<sup>4</sup>'.
contentTransformations.implementation: Author uses superscript formatting in Google Docs/Word. EDS preserves <sup> tags.

contentTransformations.description: Regulatory disclaimer is identical on all pages. Migrate as /fragments/pharma-notice fragment. Include via fragment block.
contentTransformations.implementation: Create fragment document once. Reference from each page using Fragment block.

contentTransformations.description: JUVÉDERM® brand name includes ® symbol consistently. Preserve in all authored content.
contentTransformations.implementation: Authors type ® directly. No special handling needed.

contentTransformations.description: All content is in Dutch. Placeholders sheet (placeholders.xlsx) should contain Dutch UI strings.
contentTransformations.implementation: Create /placeholders.xlsx with Dutch translations for: 'Voor' (Before), 'Na' (After), 'Meer informatie' (More info), 'Vind je kliniek' (Find your clinic), etc.

contentTransformations.description: Footnote sections contain numbered references (1-28+). These are page-specific and differ per treatment page.
contentTransformations.implementation: Author as default content in a section with style 'references'. Each page has its own footnotes, not a fragment.

contentTransformations.description: OneTrust cookie consent and 'See our new privacy terms' modal. Not part of page content.
contentTransformations.implementation: Load OneTrust via delayed.js. Remove privacy banner text from page content during migration.

rules.action: Download at max quality (width=1600, quality=85). Convert to WebP. Store in page folder.
Download at appropriate size. Store in page folder.
Download both before and after at matched dimensions. Store in page folder.
Download as PNG. Consider SVG replacement for scalability. Store in shared /icons/ folder.

imageHandling.dynamicMediaNotes: All images come from Adobe Dynamic Media CDN (/adobe/dynamicmedia/deliver/dm-aid--*). Download with preferwebp=true for WebP format. These URLs will break post-migration, so all images must be downloaded and stored locally in the EDS content repository.

linkTransformations.notes: Internal links already use relative paths starting with /nl/. Preserve as-is. EDS will resolve them correctly.
FAQ anchor links reference section IDs. Ensure corresponding sections have matching ID metadata in EDS.
Clinic quick-links use query parameters. These are handled by the clinic-finder block JS, not content links.
External links (AbbVie, Allergan, social media) preserved as-is. Add target=_blank for social links.
Root URL redirects to /nl. Add to redirects.xlsx: / → /nl

sectionStyles.name: pharma-notice
sectionStyles.description: Dark/branded background with warning icon for pharmaceutical disclaimer. Used as fragment.
sectionStyles.css: Background color (dark brand), centered text, warning icon left-aligned, regulatory emphasis.

sectionStyles.name: references
sectionStyles.description: Footnotes/citations with reduced typography. Muted, compact.
sectionStyles.css: Smaller font-size (0.75rem), muted text color, compact line-height, reduced margin/padding.

sectionStyles.name: highlight
sectionStyles.description: Emphasized sections with brand background color for benefits/key messages.
sectionStyles.css: Brand primary background color, white/contrast text, additional vertical padding.

sectionStyles.name: scroll-reveal
sectionStyles.css: Initial opacity:0 + translateY(20px). IntersectionObserver triggers transition to opacity:1 + translateY(0).

ctaPattern.primary: 'Vind je kliniek' button (primary-outline) linking to /nl/find-a-clinic — appears in header nav and as page CTAs.
ctaPattern.secondary: 'Meer informatie' text links within treatment cards linking to specific treatment pages.
ctaPattern.faqLink: 'Meer' link to /nl/qa on treatment pages after FAQ accordion teaser.

typography.loadStrategy: Consider self-hosting for performance. Load via eager phase.
typography.note: Evaluate whether self-hosted WOFF2 files provide better LCP than Typekit CDN.

externalScripts.oneTrust: Cookie consent banner. Load via delayed.js.
externalScripts.googleMaps: Load only on clinic-finder pages. Use delayed loading phase.

redirects.note: Consolidate clinic pages if /nl/clinic has no unique content

entries.text: Voer je postcode of stad in
